mapper.select:
SELECT A.RN , A.USER_IDX , A.USER_MAIL , A.USER_NM , A.USER_STAT FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY USER_IDX) AS RN , USER_IDX , USER_MAIL , USER_NM , USER_STAT FROM USER_MASTER WHERE 1=1
AND USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{schUserNm}, '%')
AND USER_STAT = #{schUserStat}
ORDER BY USER_IDX ) A WHERE 1=1
AND A.RN BETWEEN (#{curIdx} + (#{pageUnit} * (#{curPage} - 1))) AND (#{pageUnit} + (#{pageUnit} * (#{curPage} - 1)))
ORDER BY A.RN , A.USER_IDX

SELECT UM.USER_IDX , UM.USER_MAIL , UM.USER_NM , UM.USER_PW , UM.USER_STAT , UM.USER_NOTE , FM.FILE_NM_DTL FROM USER_MASTER AS UM LEFT OUTER JOIN FILE_MASTER AS FM ON UM.PROFILE_IMG = FM.FILE_NO WHERE 1=1
AND UM.USER_IDX = #{userIdx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FILE_MASTER ( FILE_NM , FILE_NM_DTL , REG_NO , REG_DATE , UP_NO , UP_DATE ) VALUES ( #{fileNm} , #{uploadFileNm} , '1' , NOW() , '1' , NOW() )

INSERT INTO USER_MASTER ( USER_MAIL , USER_NM , USER_PW , USER_STAT , USER_NOTE
, PROFILE_IMG
, REG_NO , REG_DATE , UP_NO , UP_DATE ) VALUES ( #{userMail} , #{userNm} , #{userPw} , #{userStat} , #{userNote}
, ( SELECT MAX(FILE_NO) FROM FILE_MASTER )
, '1' , NOW() , '1' , NOW() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM USER_MASTER WHERE 1=1
AND USER_IDX = #{userIdx}
